candidates.why: Appears within the Cost of goods sold section as a component beneath the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold', so it looks already embedded in the selected COGS bucket rather than a separate same-level add-on.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Explicitly tagged to Cost of Revenues and listed under the COGS section, but it appears to be a sub-component of the selected total 'Cost of goods sold', so adding it separately would likely double count.
Explicit COGS-related D&A row, but positioned as a component inside the selected COGS total rather than as a separate operating line outside it.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: COGS-related depreciation shown under the Cost of goods sold area; appears to be part of the selected COGS total, so not appropriate to add separately.
Duplicate/blank variant of the COGS D&A label with no visible values; even if relevant, it appears to refer to the same embedded COGS component and should not be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is the parent total 'Cost of goods sold'. The visible COGS D&A rows sit within that section as components of the total, so they appear already included in the selected parent row. Conservative no-add approach avoids double counting.

candidates.row_label: Amortization including Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: R&D-related D&A component, but the parent 'Research and development' row is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD; per the R&D interaction rule, this should not be added separately.

Appears in the R&D area above operating profit, but it reads as a component of R&D-related expense already handled via the selected 'Research and development' row and XRD mapping, so separate addition would risk distortion/double count.
Located in the R&D block and appears to be a sub-component of the selected operating expense buckets rather than a separate same-level SG&A line.
Explicit R&D depreciation line, but 'Research and development' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so this should not be separately added under XSGA_DA.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Another R&D D&A component that appears embedded within the selected R&D row already included in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: SG&A-related depreciation, but phrased as being inside SG&A and therefore likely embedded in the selected parent rows 'Selling Expenses' and/or 'Administrative expenses', not a separate add-on line.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Selling/admin lease depreciation appears to be a component of SG&A expenses already captured by selected operating expense rows.
Shown within the Selling Expenses section and therefore looks like a component of the selected selling/admin bucket, not a separate line to add later.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Customer relationships in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly states it is in SG&A; appears embedded in selected SG&A component rows rather than separate from them.
Selling-expense D&A label, but it appears to refer to depreciation/amortization within the already selected 'Selling Expenses' parent row; also no visible values shown.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Business systems excluding Goodwill in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A component under administrative/selling area, so it looks already included in the selected XSGA parent rows.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket already includes 'Selling Expenses', 'Administrative expenses', other operating expenses, and 'Research and development'. The visible D&A rows are labeled as being within SG&A or R&D and appear to be sub-components of those selected parent rows. Additionally, because 'Research and development' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, R&D D&A rows should not be added separately.
